ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code for the country */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the country's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country from which the data was collected */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data collection */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference for the age group */,
  "sex" INTEGER /* Sex (1 for Male, 2 for Female) */,
  "population_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population in the specified age group */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source from which the demographic data was collected */,
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quality assessment of the demographic data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the demographic data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES time_periods ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_sex FOREIGN KEY ("sex") REFERENCES sex_types ("sex_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_quality_id FOREIGN KEY ("quality_id") REFERENCES data_quality ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for age groups */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Description of the age range (e.g., '0-1 years', '1-4 years') */,
  "age_group_description" TEXT /* A more detailed description of the age group */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "parent_region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a parent region, if applicable (for hierarchical regions) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_periods" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year of the data collection */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the time period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sex_types" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for sex categories */,
  "sex_description" TEXT /* Description of the sex category (1 for Male, 2 for Female) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the sex type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country associated with the trend */,
  "trend_year" INTEGER /* Year of the trend analysis */,
  "percentage_change" REAL /* Percentage change in population from previous year */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the trend */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the trend record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_trends_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source organization */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality assessment */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic data record being assessed */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score (e.g., 0-100) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments on the quality assessment */,
  "quality_assessor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who assessed the data quality */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date when the quality assessment was performed */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the quality assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_quality_assessor_id FOREIGN KEY ("quality_assessor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* A hashed version of the user's password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic data record accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used to access the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the access log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
